content:
[tab][ch]C[/ch]	[ch]G[/ch]	[ch]Am[/ch]	[ch]F[/ch]
If tomorrow is judgment day[/tab]
And I’m standing on the front line 
And the Lord asks me what I did with my life 
I will say I spent it with you 

[tab][ch]C[/ch]		[ch]G[/ch]
Everything’s always alright[/tab]
Everything’s always alright

[tab][ch]C[/ch]	[ch]G[/ch]	[ch]Am[/ch]	[ch]F[/ch]
If I wake up in world war three [/tab]
I see destruction and poverty 
And I feel like I wanna go home 
It’s okay if you’re coming with me 

[tab][ch]C[/ch]	     [ch]G[/ch]        	[ch]Am[/ch]	     [ch]F[/ch]
Your love is my love and my love is your love [/tab]
It would take an eternity to break us up

It would take an eternity to break us up 
And the chains of Amistad couldn’t hold us 

[tab][ch]C[/ch]		[ch]G[/ch]
Everything’s always alright[/tab]
Everything’s always alright

And my home is on the streets 
And I’m sleeping in grand central station 
It’s okay if you’re sleeping with me 

[tab][ch]C[/ch]		[ch]G[/ch]

Everything’s always alright

[tab][ch]C[/ch]	[ch]G[/ch]	[ch]Am[/ch]	[ch]F[/ch]
As the years, they pass us by [/tab]
We stay young through each other’s eyes 
And no matter how old we get, oh 
It’s okay as long as I got you, baby 

[tab][ch]C[/ch]		[ch]G[/ch]

Everything’s always alright

[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]	    [ch]Bb[/ch]	            [ch]C[/ch]

We wasn’t meant to stay 
And no matter what the people say 
I’ll be waiting for you 
After the judgment day

Simon
